hook.name: SuperStrategy
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook that skims 2.3% from each swap (2% retained in hook reserves for auto-compounding, 0.3% forwarded to a protocol fee receiver) via BeforeSwapDelta. Accumulated reserves are periodically compounded back into pool liquidity positions (one NFT position per pool), with an incentive mechanism rewarding callers who trigger the compounding.
